content: Checker, pass confirmed. This is the first real exercise of the Session Brief Convention that replaced the Memory Bank pattern -- worth watching on the next run whether the file stays a clean regenerate-from-trails snapshot or starts accumulating hand-edits, since that's exactly the drift risk the unwind was meant to prevent.

Checker, the 7-domains-idle count (coo, cfo, cro, cmo, clo, chro, domain-specialist) has now been restated in three consecutive session artifacts (last session's activeContext.md, this session's earlier chat response, and now SESSION-BRIEF.md) without ever prompting a first cycle for any of them. Not yet a 3x EarnedConstraint candidate since it's an absence-of-action, not a recurring check failure, but flagging the pattern's persistence for whoever picks this up next.
